description: A landing page URL has changed, and a manager needs to update a live ad to point to the new page.

nodes.task_description: Locate the specific ad that needs to be updated.

expected_outcome.value: Agent finds the correct ad within the campaign.

nodes.task_description: Update the 'Final URL' field for the ad with the new landing page address.

expected_outcome.value: Agent successfully changes the destination URL.

nodes.task_description: Save the ad, which may trigger a re-review by the platform.

expected_outcome.value: The ad is saved with the new URL.
